heading: Existing Federal laws not modified
label: 1577 Existing Federal laws not modified
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be deemed to modify the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 [ et seq.], the Federal Water Pollution Control Act, as amended [ et seq.], or, except as expressly stated herein, the provisions of any other Federal law.42 U.S.C. 432133 U.S.C. 1251
notes: References in TextThe National Environmental Policy Act of 1969, referred to in text, is , , , which is classified generally to chapter 55 (§ 4321 et seq.) of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub.
